nasb.text: “Judah mourns And her gates languish; They sit on the ground in mourning, And the cry of Jerusalem has ascended.

esv.text: “Judah mourns, and her gates languish; her people lament on the ground, and the cry of Jerusalem goes up.

cnv.text: “猶大悲哀， 她的城鎮衰落， 人人都坐在地上悲傷痛哭； 耶路撒冷的哀聲上達於天。

ccb.text: “犹大充满悲泣， 她的城邑衰败， 人人坐在地上痛哭， 耶路撒冷哀鸣四起。
